name: Match Comic Carousel
aesthetic: Comic-book pop-art sports poster — halftone red vs halftone blue split, jagged VS starburst, chalk pitch lines, screentone dots, thick black ink outlines, hand-drawn whistle/ball/cleat stickers, yellow Bungee display type with drop-shadow, action kicker bursts. Feels like a 2000s FIFA poster spread.

slides.subject: Red top half + blue bottom half with halftone dots, jagged VS starburst center-left, two flag banners tilted, match date chip at top, stadium/city pill at bottom, whistle and ball stickers.
Red halftone background, big country name banner tilted, restaurant photo in comic-panel frame, neighbourhood pill, 2-3 dish bullets, rating badge.
Blue halftone background, mirror layout of slide 2 — big country banner, photo panel, dish list, neighbourhood pill.
Split red/blue diagonal with VS-style starburst, watch party bar photo in panel, 'where to watch' banner, bar name, TV/screen count, kickoff time chip.
Comic-panel CTA on blue halftone with red accent — BiteMap logo, chalk pitch lines, 'full kickoff guide on' banner, app badges, ball sticker.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'full kickoff guide on' / BiteMap logo / tagline / app badges

inputs_required.team1FlagUrl: string — flag image URL (SVG or PNG). Prefer Wikimedia Commons flag SVGs (https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Category:SVG_flags_of_countries). Used in slide 1 big flag card and slide 2 banner chip.
inputs_required.team2FlagUrl: string — flag image URL (same source guidance)
inputs_required.team1Theme: object — CSS color tokens driving backgrounds + accents. Keys: bg (dominant-dark flag color, used for halftone fill — must contrast with white text), a/b/c (optional palette extras for future use). Example Colombia: { bg:'#003893', a:'#FDE047', b:'#003893', c:'#CE1126' }
inputs_required.team2Theme: object — same shape. Example Canada: { bg:'#D52B1E', a:'#D52B1E', b:'#FFFFFF', c:'#D52B1E' }
inputs_required.city: string — host city for diaspora context

copy_rules: Country names always UPPERCASE in Bungee — short (6-8 letters ideal)
Restaurant names are real and verified — no placeholders
Kickoff time includes timezone (e.g. '11:00 AM PT')
Never say 'amazing' / 'must-try' — name the dish literally
asset_rules: Restaurant photo must show the food or the signage clearly
Flag images should be square or centered on a wide crop
Min 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
use_when: Any FIFA 2026 match day across the 16 host cities
Diaspora matchups where both fanbases have strong food scenes in the host city
Knockout rounds once teams are drawn
